text: As I stand before the glass doors, I sense order and meticulous design guiding my steps into this environment. The clean lines and polished surfaces evoke a feeling of anticipation, as if the space is awaiting discovery or innovation. Moving into the second scene, I encounter vibrant color and bold typography—'R+D,' a call to inquiry. The fusion of technology and creativity on display sparks my curiosity and awakens within me a sense of purposeful wonder. Here, I feel both observer and participant in the unfolding story of human ingenuity.
